title: Elbow Grease Rubber Gloves for Cleaning Bathrooms - Cotton Lined with Extra Long Sleeve | Mint Blue with In-built Antibacterial Properties (1 Pair - Size Large)
features: PREMIUM RUBBER GLOVES FOR BATHROOM CLEANING: Designed to keep hands protected while tackling tough cleaning tasks, these rubber gloves are an essential addition to any collection of cleaning products. Ideal for use with a bathroom cleaner, they shield hands from harsh chemicals and hot water.
COTTON LINED FOR ENHANCED COMFORT: These Elbow Grease rubber gloves have a soft cotton lining for improved comfort whilst cleaning making them the only glove you'll ever need
LONG SLEEVE FOR MAXIMUM COVERAGE: The extended sleeve provides forearm protection from splashes whilst cleaning, showers, baths, basins and tiles

SOFT & FLEXIBLE FOR EFFORTLESS USE: Crafted from high-quality rubber, these gloves offer superior flexibility and a natural grip, allowing you to easily switch between delicate surfaces and heavy-duty scrubbing

AVAILABLE IN MEDIUM & LARGE FOR THE PERFECT FIT: Choose the ideal size for a comfortable fit to easily manage any cleaning task. Medium and large options ensure everyone can find a pair that offers the best size for everyday cleaning tasks.

BUILT-IN ANTIBACTERIAL PROPERTIES: Elbow Grease Rubber Gloves have been treated with an antimicrobial agent to eliminate the harmful bacteria that often grow and spread across the surface of standard washing up gloves. The built-in antibacterial properties should last as long as the gloves themselves, and they're high quality so they'll see you through mountains of cleaning.

IDEAL FOR BATHROOM AND WETROOM CLEANING: Perfect for scrubbing tiles, wiping mirrors, and cleaning sinks, these gloves are a must-have for any home. Use with a bathroom cleaner to tackle dirt, grime, and soap scum effortlessly.
REUSABLE FOR LONG-LASTING USE: Made from strong, rubber, these gloves can withstand repeated use. Simply rinse in clean water after use, wipe dry and store away from direct sunlight.

MINT COLOUR FOR A FRESH LOOK: Manufactured in a stylish mint colour to easily select the bathroom cleaning gloves in your cleaning kit. Bring a pop of freshness to daily cleaning routines while keeping hands protected and dry.
VERSATILE FOR EVERYDAY CLEANING: The Elbow Grease bathroom gloves, are suitable for use when reaching in to clean ovens, domestic bins and deep shelves.
description: Product Description Designed to keep hands protected while tackling tough cleaning tasks, these extra long rubber gloves provide additional forearm protection. Ideal for bathroom use, allowing you to clean hard to reach toilet and bathroom areas with ease. Crafted from high-quality rubber, these gloves offer a soft yet sturdy grip, allowing for effortless handling of bathroom cleaner bottles, scrubbing tools, and cleaning cloths. The interior is lined with soft cotton, providing a gentle touch against the skin and ensuring a comfortable fit even during long cleaning sessions. Say goodbye to irritation and discomfort, and enjoy a more pleasant cleaning experience.The long sleeve design offers extended coverage, keeping wrists and forearms protected from splashes, moisture, and chemicals. Whether scrubbing stubborn stains from the bathtub, wiping down shower tiles, or deep-cleaning the toilet, these gloves provide reliable protection while keeping hands dry and safe. Ingredients Warning: This product contains latex. Do not use if you have an allergy to latex. Keep out of reach of children.
